viral_overseas.text: I built an AI chatbot that generated $12,000 in revenue last month by solving one specific problem for small businesses. The key wasn't the tech - it was finding the right pain point. Here's what I learned...
viral_overseas.ja_summary: 小さな問題を解決するAIチャットボットを作って先月1万2千ドル稼いだ。技術ではなく、適切な課題を見つけることが鍵だった。学んだことを共有する

viral_overseas.text: AI prompt engineering is now a $100K+ skill. I went from $0 to $8,000/month in 6 months by mastering these 7 frameworks. Most people are doing it completely wrong.
viral_overseas.ja_summary: AIプロンプトエンジニアリングは年収1000万円超のスキルになった。7つのフレームワークをマスターして6ヶ月で月収80万円達成。多くの人が間違ったやり方をしている
viral_overseas.topic: プロンプトエンジニアリング

viral_overseas.text: Just sold my first AI-generated course for $50,000. Created entirely with Claude 3.5 and took me 2 weeks. The buyer didn't even know it was AI-made. The future of education is here.
viral_overseas.ja_summary: AI生成コースを5万ドルで初売却。Claude 3.5で2週間で作成。購入者はAI製と気づかなかった。教育の未来が到来した

viral_overseas.text: Running 12 AI agents that work 24/7 for my business. They handle customer service, content creation, lead generation, and data analysis. My profit margins increased by 340% this year.
viral_overseas.ja_summary: 24時間稼働する12のAIエージェントでビジネス運営。顧客サービス、コンテンツ作成、見込み客獲得、データ分析を処理。今年利益率が340%向上

viral_overseas.text: AI replaced my entire marketing team (5 people). Now I'm generating 3x more leads with $0 monthly payroll. Here are the 8 AI tools that made it possible + my exact workflow:
viral_overseas.ja_summary: AIでマーケティングチーム5人を置き換え。人件費ゼロで3倍の見込み客を獲得中。実現した8つのAIツールと具体的なワークフローを公開
